message:
test(index): complete AG-11-T leapfrog triejoin test plan

Adds 8 tests fulfilling the bd-2t5e.17 spec: identical/disjoint/overlapping
pairs with positions, five-way vs pairwise isomorphism, single-element
merge, all-same-labels identity, associativity proof, and commutativity
proof. All 12 spec tests now pass (73 total fp-index tests).

Closes: bd-2t5e.17 (AG-11-T)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
